query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.customerName, o.totalAmount/100 as totalRupees, o.orderStatus, o.createdAt, u.name as userName FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id WHERE DATE(o.createdAt) = CURDATE() AND (o.customerName LIKE '%Kannan%' OR o.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'kannanswamy@hotmail.com'));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.customerName, o.totalAmount/100 as totalRupees, o.orderStatus, o.createdAt, u.name as userName FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id WHERE DATE(o.createdAt) = CURDATE() AND (o.customerName LIKE '%Kannan%' OR o.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'kannanswamy@hotmail.com'));
